- Actual response time: ____________ (e.g., 5-10 seconds)

## Frequency
- [ ] Always (100%)
- [ ] Often (50-99%)
- [ ] Sometimes (10-49%)
- [ ] Rare (<10%)

## User Impact
<!-- How does this affect users? -->
- [ ] Blocks critical functionality
- [ ] Causes frustration but usable
- [ ] Minor annoyance
- [ ] Only noticeable on slow connections

## What Triggers the Slowness?
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Large data sets
- [ ] Multiple applications running
- [ ] Specific time of day
- [ ] After specific actions
- [ ] Always slow, regardless of conditions

## Priority
- [ ] P0 - Critical (app unusable, major feature blocked)
- [ ] P1 - High (significantly impacts user experience)
- [ ] P2 - Medium (noticeable but doesn't block work)
